title: cs2-kit gamedata signatures.jsonc
description: Platform-specific byte patterns and offsets resolved at runtime by CS2Kit::Sdk::GameData. Fragile: re-verify after every CS2 engine update.

offsets.description: Named integer offsets (vtable indexes or byte offsets), per platform.

library.description: Module to scan, without platform prefix/suffix ("server" -> server.dll / libserver.so).

refs.description: Reserved: strings the target function references, for future fallback resolution when the pattern breaks.

pattern.description: Space-separated hex bytes; "?" or "??" is a wildcard byte.

offset.description: Byte distance from the match to a rel32 displacement (RIP-relative resolve). Omit (or 0) when the match IS the target.
